items: Report out on Closed Session from January 20, 2023
Welcome by the School Board President, Cecilia Márquez
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have a public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Bond Program Consent Items
Approval of Measure T Bond Program Tracking List of Items Under $20k
Approval of Modernization and New Building, Bid Package A, Change Order #9 to the Agreement with Duran & Venables for Orion Alternative School (Formerly John Gill School)
School Plan for Student Achievement: Adelante Selby and Orion
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 4154/4254/4354 - Health and Welfare Benefits
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5113 - Absences and Excuses
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 6164.2 – Guidance/Counseling Services
Approval of Non-Public School (NPS)/Non-Public Agency (NPA) Master Contracts
Approval of Amendment #1 to the Agreement between College Advising Prep (CAP) and the Redwood City School District to increase tutoring services for the remainder of the 2022-23 school year
Approval of Amendment #2 to the Agreement between Maxim Healthcare Staffing, Inc and the Redwood City School District
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 6158 - Independent Study
Ratification of Warrant Registers, January 1, 2023 - January 31, 2023
Denial of Classified General Leave Request(s)
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - December 2022
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two items pulled from agenda: Item 9.2 (Board Policy 4154/4254/4354 - Health and Welfare Benefits) pulled due to needed changes from board policy committee meeting; Item 9.1 Orion discussion pulled because Ms. Rivera had a family emergency. Board will focus on Adelante Selby only for School Plan for Student Achievement.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I please get a motion to approve the consent items. I move to approve the consent items. Second roll call, please.
